subcodes.first_line: ...One of the binding exhortations and explicit admonitions of the Greatest Name is to close the doors of interpretation… The laws of God regarding fasting and obligatory prayer are absolutely incumbent upon His servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله وصایای حتمیّه و نصایح صریحه اسم اعظم اینست که ابواب تأویل را مسدود نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @literal interpretation, @reincarnation, @law of obligatory prayer
